text.title: ai-marketing-tools-stack-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ai-marketing-tools-stack-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Adopting a tool for every new marketing function without evaluating integration with the existing stack.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Creates data silos requiring manual export/import between tools. The reconnection work often exceeds the automation benefit, resulting in negative ROI.

failure-mode.description: Using AI SEO tools (Surfer, Clearscope) and following their keyword density recommendations mechanically without human brand voice review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Keyword density optimization produces content that ranks but reads awkwardly. Agents following SEO tool recommendations blindly produce keyword-stuffed content. Human must balance SEO scoring against readability and brand voice.

failure-mode.description: Adopting multi-channel distribution tools before defining channel-specific content conventions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Distribution tools amplify process. Without defined conventions for LinkedIn vs. Twitter vs. newsletter format, automated variants are too similar to each other and lose channel-native feel.
